summary: Comprehensive testing of Viaje360 Map page (/mapa). All core features working correctly: map loads with Mapbox dark style, activity markers display with correct colors (hotel=purple, park=green, restaurant=orange), play/pause/reset animation controls work properly with progress bar advancing, transport mode selector changes route color and time estimates, activity list panel shows turn-by-turn directions. The 'Maximum update depth exceeded' React error appears intermittently during initial load but does not affect functionality.

ui_bugs.issue: Intermittent 'Maximum update depth exceeded' React error on initial page load - appears in ~50% of page loads but does not break functionality

passed_tests: Map loads correctly at /mapa with Mapbox dark-v11 style
Activity markers display with correct colors: hotel=purple (#8B5CF6), park=green (#22C55E), restaurant=orange (#F97316)
Avatar marker displays with gradient background
Play button starts animation - progress bar advances (0% → 16% in 3 seconds)
Pause button pauses animation and shows play icon again
Reset button returns avatar to start position and progress to 0%
Transport mode selector (walk/bike/car) changes route color and time estimates
List toggle shows activity panel with turn-by-turn directions
Activity list shows 'Indicaciones (8-9 pasos)' with detailed navigation steps
Route summary card shows total duration and distance
Trip header displays 'Barcelona Adventure' and 'Barcelona, España'
3 paradas badge visible in bottom-right corner
Mapbox integration works with configured token
action_items: OPTIONAL: Investigate intermittent 'Maximum update depth exceeded' error in useRouteAnimation.ts - appears during initial load but doesn't affect functionality
critical_code_review_comments: The useRouteAnimation hook has complex state management that may cause the intermittent React error - consider using useReducer for batched state updates
The activitiesKey dependency in useEffect (line 293) could be optimized to prevent unnecessary re-renders
seed_data_creation: Mock API at /api/trips/active provides test data for Barcelona, Madrid, and Paris
context_for_next_testing_agent: Map page is fully functional. The 'Maximum update depth exceeded' error is intermittent and does not affect user experience. All animation controls (play/pause/reset), transport modes (walk/bike/car), and activity list with directions work correctly. Mock API provides data for Barcelona by default.
mocked_api_note: The /api/trips/active endpoint returns MOCKED data for Barcelona (default), Madrid, and Paris. Real trip data integration not tested.
